title: Floral Chewy Quick Fix Flour Bite-Sized Nuggets
description: These chewy flour nuggets are quick and easy to make with a hint of floral lemon zest, perfect for a light breakfast or snack.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, baking powder, coconut oil, lemon zest, vanilla extract, and salt. Mix until well combined.
Gradually add unsweetened cocoa powder while continuing to mix until dough forms.
Divide the dough into 24 equal parts (about the size of your thumb) and shape each part into a small ball or nugget.
Place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Flatten slightly with the palm of your hand if desired.
Bake for 8-10 minutes, until golden brown.
Remove from oven and let cool before serving.
